headline: Crown Castle (CCI) Positioned for Long-Term Growth in Tower Leasing
summary: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) ranks among the best high profit margin stocks to buy. On March 5, Bernstein SocGen Group began coverage of Crown Castle Inc.
